title: Dave Inc. Q3 2024 Earnings Call: Record Q3 Results and Guidance Raise
text:
Dave reported record Q3 2024 results with revenue reaching $92.5 million, representing 41% year-over-year growth. The company achieved its fourth consecutive quarter of accelerating year-over-year revenue growth, driven by increases in both monthly transacting members (up 23% to 2.4 million) and average revenue per user (up 14%).

Key Metrics:
- Adjusted EBITDA: $24.7 million, up 63% sequentially
- ExtraCash Originations: $1.4 billion, up 46% year-over-year
- Non-GAAP Variable Profit Margin: 69% of GAAP revenue, up 1,300 basis points year-over-year
- Credit Performance: 28-day delinquency rate improved to 1.78%, down 64 basis points year-over-year
- Customer Acquisition Cost: $15, down 14% year-over-year

Raised Guidance:
- Revenue: $340-$343 million (previously $310-$325 million)
- Adjusted EBITDA: $71-$74 million (previously $40-$50 million)

Strategic Developments: Dave announced a nonbinding letter of intent with a major sponsor bank to support credit and banking products. The company is also testing a simplified mandatory fee structure for ExtraCash that would eliminate optional tips and instant transfer fees while maintaining revenue targets.

Headwinds: Management noted a $7 million accrual for FTC litigation expenses related to consumer disclosure practices, though leadership expressed confidence in their legal defense.
